narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads CSM at 100 on both D1 and H4 in a Risk-Off High regime, driven by the US 10Y yield spiking 3% to 4.595% alongside S&P 500 down 1.24% and copper collapsing 4.15%, confirming inflation-fear liquidation not safe-haven buying. GBPUSD is the cleanest expression with D1+H4 aligned sell and GBP at CSM zero, amplified by GBPJPY correlation at 0.94 meaning GBP weakness is broad-based; USDCAD adds a second conviction trade as CAD H4 CSM accelerates to 55 versus D1 at 33, a 22-point divergence flagged as the most important short-term signal, with USDCAD showing D1+H4 momentum aligned up. AUD is the critical counter: D1 CSM 65 versus H4 CSM 26 is a 39-point divergence, meaning AUDUSD and AUDJPY longs on D1 signals are traps until H4 stabilises.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60, D1 59 rising and H4 70 rising, both timeframes aligned long
Fading: GBPUSD CMP 36, NZDUSD CMP 43, EURUSD CMP 37, H4 momentum collapsing across all three

WATCH
US CPI print hits USDJPY directly; a beat above consensus extends the H4 Buy signal toward 110-handle resistance with CADJPY confirming via 0.54 correlation
Silver, already down 8.67%, breaks $76 handle, AUDUSD accelerates its H4 sell as commodity FX takes a second leg lower
GBPJPY tests key H4 structure support; a break lower triggered by further equity selling confirms the 0.94 GBPUSD correlation and opens the D1 sell target

themes.theme: Equity Market Selloff on Inflation Concerns
Bond Yield Spike Signaling Inflation Fears

key_observation: Inflation fears are driving a significant risk-off move with equities selling off sharply and bond yields spiking. Agricultural commodities are broadly weakening which typically supports USD strength. The market is repricing rate expectations upward.
watch: USD strength continuation dependent on Fed communication and inflation data trajectory. Monitor equity stabilization attempts and whether bond yields consolidate or push higher. Agricultural commodity stabilization could signal bottoming.
